"RUS"={
	country="RUS"
	48={
		first_name="Pyotr III"
		family="c:RUS.fam:Romanov"
		birth_date=1728.01.01
		death_date=1762.01.01
		culture="russian"
		religion="orthodox"
		no_traits=yes
		dna=""
	}
	144={
		first_name="Yekaterina II"
		nickname=" the Great"
		family="c:RUS.fam:Romanov"
		birth_date=1729.01.01
		# [#329 boot-test] REMOVED death_date=1796.01.01. The engine's setup snapshot treats ANY
		# character carrying a death_date as already-dead when it evaluates set_as_ruler, so this
		# threw "set_as_ruler ... Yekaterina II ... is not alive" (error.log) and RUS fell back to
		# an engine auto-pick (the infant Aleksandr I / random "Grigoriy Bulganin" the user saw).
		# Setup rulers must NOT carry a death_date (0/94 Invictus setup rulers do); natural death
		# is handled by the age/history system after load.
		culture="north_german"
		religion="orthodox"
		no_traits=yes
		female=yes
		# [bookmark-1763 #320 B1/B2] Catherine II ('the Great') was Empress of Russia on 1763.2.16
		# (r.1762-1796). #240 removed the UNBORN Aleksandr I (b.1777) as ruler but left NO ruler set,
		# so the engine generated a random placeholder (the 'Grigoriy Bulganin' the boot test showed).
		# Seat Catherine II — she is alive at the start and heads the Romanov dynasty here.
		c:RUS={
			set_as_ruler=char:144
		}
		dna=""
	}
	632={ # [BT-Catherine fix 2026-07-22] Grigory Orlov — Catherine II's favourite/de-facto consort at the
		# 1763 start. A PLACEHOLDER SPOUSE created solely so the engine (which hard-auto-marries single adult
		# monarchy rulers, and re-marries them to random generated strays every ~30 days) never sees Catherine
		# as single and stops wedding her to invented Russians. marry_character is carried here on the later-
		# defined partner (the #50 spouse idiom); char ids are globally contiguous (632 = prior max 631 + 1).
		first_name="Grigory Orlov"
		family_name="Orlov"
		birth_date=1734.10.17
		culture="russian"
		religion="orthodox"
		no_traits=yes
		marry_character=char:144
		add_gold=100
		dna=""
	}
	145={
		first_name="Pavel I"
		family="c:RUS.fam:Romanov"
		birth_date=1754.01.01
		# [logfix death_date>1763.2.16] removed death_date=1801.01.01 (setup snapshot reads any death_date as already-dead; age system handles natural death after load)
		mother="char:144"
		father="char:48"
		culture="russian"
		religion="orthodox"
		no_traits=yes
		dna=""
	}
	146={
		first_name="Maria Feodorovna"
		family = "c:WUR.fam:vonWurttemberg"
		birth_date=1759.01.01
		female=yes
		culture="north_german"
		religion="orthodox"
		dna=""
	}
	163={
		first_name="Konstantinos"
		family_name="Ypsilantis"
		birth_date=1760.01.01
		culture="greek"
		religion="orthodox"
		dna=""
	}
	289={
		first_name="Mikhail Semyonovich"
		family_name="Vorontsov"
		birth_date=1782.05.30
		culture="russian"
		religion="orthodox"
		add_trait="military_officer"
	}
}
